title: Meeting Minutes Note Taker
scenario: Write a brief meeting minutes note template that captures key discussion points, action items, and decisions. The output should be in a simple text format.
constraints: Must include the date, time, and attendees' names
Use active voice to convey the tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt includes the required details (date, time, attendees) and uses active voice.
Verify if the meeting minutes note template captures key discussion points, action items, and decisions.
Evaluate if the tone is professional and concise.
